positive: A whimsical, stylized watercolor-pop art illustration of a cosmic forest scene. The main subject is a group of bioluminescent, floating flora and fauna (mushrooms, stylized woodland creatures, glowing saplings) emerging from a central root system. The overall composition should be circular and symmetrical, perfect for a t-shirt print. Use a palette of deep indigos, vibrant teals, electric lavender, and soft neon yellows. Emphasize clean, bold silhouettes against a slightly textured, off-white background. Style should evoke a blend of Art Nouveau and retro 8-bit aesthetics, with strong outlines and high contrast areas. Studio lighting, flat graphic design aesthetic, vector illustration, minimal shading.
negative: blurry, noisy, text, watermark, logos, writing, bad anatomy, fused limbs, extra limbs, jpeg artifacts, low quality, monochrome, photorealistic, cinematic, messy, gore
